title: Rot-to-Hide
description: Players can transform rotten flesh into leather by smelting it in a furnace, smoker, standard campfire or soul campfire.
body:
Transform your surplus of zombie remains into a valuable crafting resource with Rot-to-Hide. This mod introduces a balanced way to recycle rotten flesh by allowing you to "cure" it using various heat sources. For a quick turnaround, you can use a furnace or smoker, or you can opt for a fuel-efficient approach by laying the flesh across the embers of a campfire or soul campfire to dry it into usable leather.

## Key Features
The Smoker’s Advantage: Use a smoker to double the speed of the curing process, perfect for large-scale leather production.

Campfire Curing: Save your coal and wood by placing up to four pieces of flesh on a standard or soul campfire for a slow, natural dry.

Balanced Gameplay: Provides a much-needed utility for one of the game's most common "junk" items without breaking the early-game economy.
